    x11-wm/bbpager: add LICENSE

    License is GPLv2 and add LICENSE_FILE (COPYING).
    Add ice and xft to USE_XORG.
    Remove COPYING from DOCS.
    Remove empty NEWS and INSTALL from DOCS.
    Pet portlint and portfmt.
